info.title: API Endpoints
info.description:
# BiblioReads API Documention

BiblioReads is a web scraping API that aggregates book-related data from Goodreads. It provides structured access to book search results, author profiles, series information, reviews, quotes, award winners, and curated reading lists — all via simple POST requests with a Goodreads URL or identifier in the body.

All endpoints accept `Content-Type: application/json` and are available at both `{{Localhost URL}}` (local development) and `{{Public URL}}` (production).

**Please note that this is NOT an official API, and could change without notice.**

---

## Endpoints

| Endpoint | Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `POST /api/search/books` | search-books | Search for books by keyword using a Goodreads search URL |
| `POST /api/reviews-scraper` | reviews-scraper | Fetch paginated reviews for a specific book |
| `POST /api/similar-scraper` | similar-scraper | Get a list of books similar to a given title |
| `POST /api/author/info` | author-scraper | Retrieve profile information for an author |
| `POST /api/author/books` | author-books-scraper | List all books published by a specific author |
| `POST /api/series-scraper` | series-scraper | Get details and book order for a book series |
| `POST /api/awards/winners-list` | winners-list | Retrieve the list of award-winning books for a given year/category |
| `POST /api/awards/winner-page` | winner-page | Get full details for a specific award category winner page |
| `POST /api/quotes/home` | quotes-home | Scrape featured quotes from the Goodreads quotes home page |
| `POST /api/quotes/slug` | quotes-search | Search for quotes by tag or topic slug |
| `POST /api/list-scraper` | list-scraper | Scrape books from a Goodreads community reading list |

post.description:
## Search Books

Searches for books on Goodreads by keyword. Pass a Goodreads search URL as the `queryURL` and receive a structured list of matching books.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/search/books`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/search?q=powerless"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | A Goodreads search URL with the `q` query parameter set to the search term |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "books": [
    {
      "title": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "rating": "string",
      "ratingsCount": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `books` | array | List of matching book results |
| `books[].title` | string | Title of the book |
| `books[].author` | string | Author name |
| `books[].url` | string | Goodreads URL for the book |
| `books[].coverImage` | string | URL of the book cover image |
| `books[].rating` | string | Average rating |
| `books[].ratingsCount` | string | Total number of ratings |

## Reviews Scraper

Fetches paginated community reviews for a specific book. Use `nextPageToken` to paginate through additional pages of reviews.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/reviews-scraper`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

``` json
{
  "resourceID": "kca://work/amzn1.gr.work.v1.U_UP9GjBCWvFz0W1V-A5fQ",
  "legacyBookID": 11387515,
  "nextPageToken": null
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `resourceID` | string | Yes | The Goodreads KCA resource ID for the book (format: `kca://work/...`) |
| `legacyBookID` | number | No | The legacy numeric Goodreads book ID. Optional when `resourceID` is provided |
| `nextPageToken` | string | null | No | Pagination token from a previous response. Pass `null` for the first page |

---

### Response

**Success** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{
  "reviews": [
    {
      "reviewer": "string",
      "reviewerURL": "string",
      "rating": "string",
      "date": "string",
      "text": "string"
    }
  ],
  "nextPageToken": "string | null"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `reviews` | array | List of review objects |
| `reviews[].reviewer` | string | Display name of the reviewer |
| `reviews[].reviewerURL` | string | Goodreads profile URL of the reviewer |
| `reviews[].rating` | string | Star rating given by the reviewer |
| `reviews[].date` | string | Date the review was posted |
| `reviews[].text` | string | Full text of the review |
| `nextPageToken` | string | null | Token to pass in the next request to fetch the following page. `null` when no more pages exist |

## Similar Books Scraper

Returns a list of books that Goodreads recommends as similar to a given title. Useful for building "readers also enjoyed" or recommendation features.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/similar-scraper`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

``` json
{
  "bookID": "kca://book/amzn1.gr.book.v1.kUA9FFwWCuSBb-AdLEwsvQ",
  "legacyBookID": 11387515
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `bookID` | string | Yes | The Goodreads KCA book ID (format: `kca://book/...`) |
| `legacyBookID` | number | No | The legacy numeric Goodreads book ID. Optional when `bookID` is provided |

---

### Response

**Success** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{
  "similarBooks": [
    {
      "title": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "rating": "string"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `similarBooks` | array | List of similar book recommendations |
| `similarBooks[].title` | string | Title of the recommended book |
| `similarBooks[].author` | string | Author of the recommended book |
| `similarBooks[].url` | string | Goodreads URL for the book |
| `similarBooks[].coverImage` | string | URL of the book cover image |
| `similarBooks[].rating` | string | Average Goodreads rating |

## Author Info Scraper

Retrieves profile information for a Goodreads author, including their biography, genres, follower count, and aggregate ratings.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/author/info`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/3389.Stephen_King"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The full Goodreads author profile URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/<id>.<Name>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "name": "string",
  "url": "string",
  "image": "string",
  "rating": "string",
  "ratingsCount": "string",
  "reviewsCount": "string",
  "genres": ["string"],
  "bio": "string",
  "followersCount": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | Author's full name |
| `url` | string | Goodreads profile URL |
| `image` | string | URL of the author's profile photo |
| `rating` | string | Average rating across all works |
| `ratingsCount` | string | Total number of ratings |
| `reviewsCount` | string | Total number of reviews |
| `genres` | array of strings | List of genres the author is known for |
| `bio` | string | Author biography |
| `followersCount` | string | Number of Goodreads followers |

## Awards Winners List

Retrieves the list of award categories and their winning books for a given Goodreads Choice Awards year. Use this to get a high-level overview of all award categories on the awards landing page.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/awards/winners-list`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/choiceawards/best-books-2023"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The Goodreads Choice Awards URL for a specific year (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/choiceawards/best-books-<year>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "year": "string",
  "categories": [
    {
      "category": "string",
      "categoryURL": "string",
      "winner": {
        "title": "string",
        "author": "string",
        "coverImage": "string"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `year` | string | The awards year |
| `categories` | array | List of award categories |
| `categories[].category` | string | Name of the award category (e.g. `"Best Fiction"`) |
| `categories[].categoryURL` | string | Goodreads URL for the category winner page |
| `categories[].winner.title` | string | Title of the winning book |
| `categories[].winner.author` | string | Author of the winning book |
| `categories[].winner.coverImage` | string | URL of the winning book's cover image |

## Award Winner Page

Fetches the full detail page for a specific Goodreads Choice Awards category, including the winner and all nominees with their vote counts.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/awards/winner-page`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/choiceawards/best-fiction-books-2023"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The Goodreads Choice Awards category URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/choiceawards/<category>-<year>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "category": "string",
  "year": "string",
  "winner": {
    "title": "string",
    "author": "string",
    "url": "string",
    "coverImage": "string",
    "votes": "string"
  },
  "nominees": [
    {
      "title": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "votes": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `category` | string | Award category name |
| `year` | string | Awards year |
| `winner` | object | The winning book for this category |
| `winner.title` | string | Title of the winning book |
| `winner.author` | string | Author of the winning book |
| `winner.url` | string | Goodreads URL for the winning book |
| `winner.coverImage` | string | Cover image URL |
| `winner.votes` | string | Number of votes received |
| `nominees` | array | All other nominated books in this category |
| `nominees[].title` | string | Nominee book title |
| `nominees[].author` | string | Nominee author |
| `nominees[].url` | string | Goodreads URL |
| `nominees[].coverImage` | string | Cover image URL |
| `nominees[].votes` | string | Number of votes received |

## Series Scraper

Retrieves structured information about a book series, including the series title, description, and an ordered list of all books in the series.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/series-scraper`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/series/45175-harry-potter"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The full Goodreads series URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/series/<id>-<series-name>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "title": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "books": [
    {
      "order": "string",
      "title": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "rating": "string",
      "ratingsCount": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `title` | string | Name of the series |
| `description` | string | Series description or synopsis |
| `books` | array | Ordered list of books in the series |
| `books[].order` | string | Position of the book within the series (e.g. `"1"`, `"2"`, `"2.5"`) |
| `books[].title` | string | Book title |
| `books[].author` | string | Author name |
| `books[].url` | string | Goodreads URL for the book |
| `books[].coverImage` | string | URL of the book cover image |
| `books[].rating` | string | Average Goodreads rating |
| `books[].ratingsCount` | string | Total number of ratings |

## Author Books Scraper

Retrieves a paginated list of books published by a specific author. Use the `page` field to navigate through multiple pages of results.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/author/books`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "page": 1,
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/author/list/3389.Stephen_King"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The Goodreads author book list URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/author/list/<id>.<Name>`) |
| `page` | number | No | Page number for pagination. Defaults to `1` |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "books": [
    {
      "title": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "rating": "string",
      "ratingsCount": "string",
      "publishedYear": "string"
    }
  ],
  "totalBooks": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `books` | array | List of books by the author |
| `books[].title` | string | Book title |
| `books[].url` | string | Goodreads URL for the book |
| `books[].coverImage` | string | URL of the book cover image |
| `books[].rating` | string | Average Goodreads rating |
| `books[].ratingsCount` | string | Total number of ratings |
| `books[].publishedYear` | string | Year the book was published |
| `totalBooks` | string | Total number of books by this author on Goodreads |

## Quotes Home

Scrapes the featured quotes from the Goodreads quotes home page, returning a curated list of popular quotes along with their authors and associated tags.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/quotes/home`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/quotes"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The Goodreads quotes home URL. Should always be `https://www.goodreads.com/quotes` |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "quotes": [
    {
      "text": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "authorURL": "string",
      "book": "string",
      "bookURL": "string",
      "tags": ["string"],
      "likes": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `quotes` | array | List of featured quotes |
| `quotes[].text` | string | The full quote text |
| `quotes[].author` | string | Name of the person the quote is attributed to |
| `quotes[].authorURL` | string | Goodreads URL for the author |
| `quotes[].book` | string | Title of the book the quote is from (if applicable) |
| `quotes[].bookURL` | string | Goodreads URL for the source book |
| `quotes[].tags` | array of strings | Tags associated with the quote (e.g. `["inspirational", "life"]`) |
| `quotes[].likes` | string | Number of likes the quote has received |

## Quotes Search (by Tag/Slug)

Searches for quotes on Goodreads filtered by a specific tag or topic slug. Returns a list of quotes matching the given tag.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/quotes/slug`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/quotes/tag?id=Sad"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | A Goodreads quotes tag URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/quotes/tag?id=<tag>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "tag": "string",
  "quotes": [
    {
      "text": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "authorURL": "string",
      "book": "string",
      "bookURL": "string",
      "tags": ["string"],
      "likes": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `tag` | string | The tag/slug used to filter quotes |
| `quotes` | array | List of quotes matching the tag |
| `quotes[].text` | string | The full quote text |
| `quotes[].author` | string | Name of the person the quote is attributed to |
| `quotes[].authorURL` | string | Goodreads URL for the author |
| `quotes[].book` | string | Title of the source book (if applicable) |
| `quotes[].bookURL` | string | Goodreads URL for the source book |
| `quotes[].tags` | array of strings | All tags associated with the quote |
| `quotes[].likes` | string | Number of likes the quote has received |

## List Scraper

Scrapes books from a Goodreads community-curated reading list. Returns the list title, description, and all books included in the list with their rankings.

---

### Request

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{Localhost URL}}/api/list-scraper`  
**Headers:**

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Content-Type | application/json |

**Body** (`application/json`):

```json
{
  "queryURL": "https://www.goodreads.com/list/show/18834.BBC_Top_200_Books"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `queryURL` | string | Yes | The full Goodreads list URL (format: `https://www.goodreads.com/list/show/<id>.<List_Name>`) |

---

### Response

**Success `200 OK`:**

```json
{
  "listTitle": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "booksCount": "string",
  "books": [
    {
      "rank": "string",
      "title": "string",
      "author": "string",
      "url": "string",
      "coverImage": "string",
      "rating": "string",
      "ratingsCount": "string",
      "score": "string"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `listTitle` | string | Title of the Goodreads list |
| `description` | string | Description or context for the list |
| `booksCount` | string | Total number of books in the list |
| `books` | array | Ranked list of books |
| `books[].rank` | string | Position of the book in the list |
| `books[].title` | string | Book title |
| `books[].author` | string | Author name |
| `books[].url` | string | Goodreads URL for the book |
| `books[].coverImage` | string | URL of the book cover image |
| `books[].rating` | string | Average Goodreads rating |
| `books[].ratingsCount` | string | Total number of ratings |
| `books[].score` | string | Community voting score for the list position |
